headlines.headline: Zelvon Biosciences delays product launch in supply chain optimization segment

headlines.headline: Zelvon Biosciences sees 18% margin improvement in latest quarter

sentiment.reasoning: An 18% margin improvement is a strong indicator of operational efficiency and improved profitability.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
